subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, O Thou Who holdest in Thy grasp all names, and at Whose behest all things are set in motion!
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا من فی قبضتک زمام الاسماء و بارادتک تحرکت الاشیاء اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
